CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time > sys.epoch(1000000000);
SELECT event_id FROM timestamps WHERE event_time = sys.epoch(1234567890);
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM event_time)) FROM timestamps;
SELECT t1.event_id FROM timestamps t1 JOIN timestamps t2 ON t1.event_time < t2.event_time WHERE t1.event_id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < sys.epoch(2000000000)) AS unique_events;
SELECT MAX(event_time), MIN(event_time) FROM timestamps WHERE event_time BETWEEN sys.epoch(500000000) AND sys.epoch(1500000000);
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IN (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_id > 1);
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_timestamps AS SELECT event_id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
